dslRule:
<!id: add.deprecated.to.method.of.deprecated.type>
<!description: Add @Deprecated to a method if its enclosing class is deprecated but the method is not. This aligns with the COMPILER_PB_MEMBER_OF_DEPRECATED_TYPE warning.
>
<!severity: WARNING>

$retType $methodName($params$) :: containsAnnotation("java.lang.Deprecated") && !isDeprecated($methodName) && !isInConstructor()
=> @java.lang.Deprecated $retType $methodName($params$)
;;

verification.message: Candidate DSL must contain only one rule and optional per-rule metadata; file metadata, includes, and embedded Java are not promotable

dslRule:
<!id: markdown.javadoc.indentation.fix>
<!description: Adds a space after '///' in markdown Javadoc comments to ensure correct indentation in the Javadoc auto-indent strategy.
This rule specifically targets the JavaDocAutoIndentStrategy class to avoid unintended side effects on other string literals.
>
<!severity: INFO>

$buf.append("///") :: inClass("org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.javadoc.JavaDocAutoIndentStrategy")
=> $buf.append("/// ")
;;
summary: Adds a trailing space to the string literal "///" when passed to an append method, specifically within the JavaDocAutoIndentStrategy class to correct markdown comment indentation.

verification.message: Candidate DSL must contain only one rule and optional per-rule metadata; file metadata, includes, and embedded Java are not promotable

dslRule:
<!id: use-diamond-operator>
<!description: Replace explicit type arguments with the diamond operator where type can be inferred by the compiler (Java 7+).
This transformation is only applied if the compiler infers the same type with the diamond operator, ensuring semantic equivalence.>
<!severity: HINT>

new $Type<$Exprs$>()
=>
new $Type<>()
;;
summary: Replaces explicit type arguments in constructor calls (e.g., `new ArrayList<String>()`) with the diamond operator (`new ArrayList<>()`) if type inference allows for identical type derivation. This is a common Java 7+ modernization.

dslRule:
<!id: use-unimplemented-code-cleanup-core>
<!description: Replace instantiation of UnimplementedCodeCleanUp with UnimplementedCodeCleanUpCore, reflecting an internal refactoring within JDT UI components.>
<!severity: HINT>

new org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.UnimplementedCodeCleanUp($args$)
=>
new org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.UnimplementedCodeCleanUpCore($args$)
;;
summary: Replaces direct instantiation of `org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.UnimplementedCodeCleanUp` with `org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.UnimplementedCodeCleanUpCore`, reflecting a class name change during an internal JDT refactoring.

dslRule:
<!id: remove-unnecessary-message-format>
<!description: Remove unnecessary Messages.format call when the message constant is known to not require formatting arguments. This applies to specific static string fields that do not contain placeholders (e.g., {0}).>
<!severity: INFO>
org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.buildpaths.Messages.format(org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.NewWizardMessages.AnnotationsAttachmentBlock_filename_error_notabsolute, $arg)
=>
org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.wizards.NewWizardMessages.AnnotationsAttachmentBlock_filename_error_notabsolute
;;
summary: Removes a specific `Messages.format` call when the target message constant `AnnotationsAttachmentBlock_filename_error_notabsolute` is known to not contain format placeholders, simplifying the expression.

verification.message: Candidate DSL must contain only one rule and optional per-rule metadata; file metadata, includes, and embedded Java are not promotable

dslRule:
<!id: replace-png-with-gif-images>
<!description: Replaces specific '.png' image file extensions with '.gif' in string literal concatenations used for image constant definitions. This addresses compatibility issues where .gif is preferred over .png.

Note: The `<!map>` contains a representative subset of the actual 60+ mappings found in the original commit. In a full implementation, the map would be exhaustive for all affected image constants.>
<!severity: INFO>

<!map PNG_TO_GIF_LITERALS:
  "methpub_obj.png" => "methpub_obj.gif",
  "methpro_obj.png" => "methpro_obj.gif",
  "methpri_obj.png" => "methpri_obj.gif",
  "methdef_obj.png" => "methdef_obj.gif",
  "field_public_obj.png" => "field_public_obj.gif",
  "field_protected_obj.png" => "field_protected_obj.gif",
  "field_private_obj.png" => "field_private_obj.gif",
  "field_default_obj.png" => "field_default_obj.gif",
  "view_menu.png" => "view_menu.gif",
  "ghost.png" => "ghost.gif",
  "search_tsk.png" => "search_tsk.gif",
  "packd_obj.png" => "packd_obj.gif",
  "jcu_obj.png" => "jcu_obj.gif",
  "localvariable_obj.png" => "localvariable_obj.gif",
  "correction_change.png" => "correction_change.gif",
  "correction_move.png" => "correction_move.gif"
>

$prefixExpr + #{PNG_TO_GIF_LITERALS}
=> $prefixExpr + #{PNG_TO_GIF_LITERALS_VALUE}
;;
summary: This rule uses a map expansion to replace specific '.png' string literals with their '.gif' counterparts when they are part of a string concatenation expression, typically used for image path constants.

dslRule:
<!id: preference.codeassist.autoactivation.delay.default.zero>
<!description: Sets the default content assist auto-activation delay from 200ms to 0ms.
This change aligns with Bug 161403, improving the responsiveness of content assist.
Only applies to the specific constant value 200.
>
<!severity: HINT>

$store.setDefault(org.eclipse.jdt.ui.PreferenceConstants.CODEASSIST_AUTOACTIVATION_DELAY, 200)
=>
$store.setDefault(org.eclipse.jdt.ui.PreferenceConstants.CODEASSIST_AUTOACTIVATION_DELAY, 0)
;;
summary: Replace specific preference store default value for auto-activation delay from 200 to 0.

summary: Replaced `Modifier.isStatic(method.getModifiers()) && !method.isSynthetic()` with `method != null && Modifier.isStatic(method.getModifiers())` in boolean conditions to improve null safety and fix specific API behavior for `IMethodBinding`.
